mapper.sql: id, apply_info_no, apply_info_name, patent_type, start_date, end_date, apply_info_state, note, creator_id, creator_name, create_time, operate_time, patent_state, to_review_state, review_state
mapper.select:
select id as rowId, apply_info_no as applyInfoNo, apply_info_name as applyInfoName, patent_type as patentType, case when ply.patent_type='1' then '发明专利' when ply.patent_type='2' then '实用新型' when ply.patent_type='3' then '外观设计' else '' END as patentTypeName, start_date as startDate, end_date as endDate, apply_info_state as applyInfoState, case when ply.apply_info_state='0' then '未启动' when ply.apply_info_state='1' then '申报中' when ply.apply_info_state='2' then '已停止' else '' END as applyInfoStateName, note, patent_state as patentState, case when ply.patent_state='1' then '专利申请' when ply.patent_state='2' then '专利公开' when ply.patent_state='3' then '专利授权' when ply.patent_state='4' then '专利终止' when ply.patent_state='5' then '专利转让' else '' END as patentStateName, to_review_state as toReviewState, review_state as reviewState from srm_patent_apply_info ply where 1=1
and ply.apply_info_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{patentApplyInfoDto.applyInfoName}, '%')
and ply.apply_info_state=#{patentApplyInfoDto.applyInfoState}
order by ply.id desc

select id as rowId, apply_info_no as applyInfoNo, apply_info_name as applyInfoName, patent_type as patentType, case when ply.patent_type='1' then '发明专利' when ply.patent_type='2' then '实用新型' when ply.patent_type='3' then '外观设计' else '' END as patentTypeName, start_date as startDate, end_date as endDate, apply_info_state as applyInfoState, case when ply.apply_info_state='0' then '未启动' when ply.apply_info_state='1' then '申报中' when ply.apply_info_state='2' then '已停止' else '' END as patentTypeName, note, patent_state as patentState, case when ply.patent_state='1' then '专利申请' when ply.patent_state='2' then '专利公开' when ply.patent_state='3' then '专利授权' when ply.patent_state='4' then '专利终止' when ply.patent_state='5' then '专利转让' else '' END as patentTypeName, to_review_state as toReviewState, review_state as reviewState from srm_patent_apply_info ply where ply.id=#{rowId}
